title: Crispy Tuscan Chicken Pasta
description: A fresh and crispy Italian dish featuring chicken, pasta, and blueberries, perfect for a date night. This recipe uses a pressure cooker for efficient cooking.
instructions: Season the chicken with salt, black pepper, and dried basil.
Heat the olive oil in the pressure cooker over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the pressure cooker and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic to the pressure cooker and cook for 1 minute.
Add the penne pasta, blueberries, and balsamic vinegar to the pressure cooker.
Close the lid and set the valve to 'sealing'. Cook on high pressure for 5 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 5 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Stir in the parmesan cheese until melted and well combined.
Serve the chicken and pasta hot, garnished with additional blueberries if desired.
